tablet-stand-adjustable.cjName: 360 Degree Spiral Base Lazy Mobile Phone Tablet Stand
tablet-stand-adjustable.name: Adjustable Tablet Stand
tablet-stand-adjustable.description: Hands-free viewing for recipes, video calls, and streaming.
tablet-stand-adjustable.longDescription: Prop tablets at the perfect angle on desks, kitchen counters, and nightstands. Adjustable hinge holds position for typing, drawing, or watching shows. Non-slip base keeps the stand steady on smooth surfaces. Ships from our US warehouse in 3–5 business days.
